---
title: "\'Preface - Noblesse Oblige\'"
---

## \'Preface - Noblesse Oblige\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1876
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (Christmas 1876) 588-91

### Notes

CMY\'s introduction to the Christmas number opens with a poem, entitled \'Noblesse Oblige\' which is signed E. E. B. and therefore not by her.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
